Crop Name: jujube

Profile
- Season type: medium-season (TSUM total=2157 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: warm-adapted (TBASEM=10.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature + daylength (IDSL=1, DLO=14.00 h)
- Root/water trait: moderately deep-rooted, more drought-sensitive (RDMCR=120.00 cm, DEPNR=1.50)
- Assimilation trait: lower assimilation potential (AMAX peak=39.00)
- Storage allocation: unknown (FOTB onset DVS=NA)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0200
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0144, DVS1=0.0048
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.0960, DVS1=0.0320

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
